ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Full name of the department */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's role and responsibilities */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the current head of the department */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the department was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the department */,
  "budget_controller" TEXT /* Name of the budget controller for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the year */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate for the year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the year */,
  "president" TEXT /* Name of the president in office during the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "rd_budget" REAL /* Research and Development (R&D) budget */,
  "total_outlays" REAL /* Total outlays for the department */,
  "discretionary_outlays" REAL /* Discretionary outlays for the department */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) for the year */,
  "initial_budget" REAL /* Initial budget allocated at the beginning of the year */,
  "revised_budget" REAL /* Revised budget after adjustments */,
  "budget_status" TEXT /* Status of the budget (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "budget_source" TEXT /* Source of the budget (e.g., federal, state, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of economic indicator (e.g., GDP, Inflation Rate, Unemployment Rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the indicator */,
  "indicator_source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator data */,
  "indicator_status" TEXT /* Status of the indicator (e.g., official, estimated) */,
  "indicator_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal policy */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the fiscal policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fiscal policy */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Impact of the fiscal policy on budget allocations */,
  "policy_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal policy */,
  "policy_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal policy */,
  "policy_impact_factor" REAL /* Factor indicating the impact of the policy on budget allocations (e.g., 1.05 for a 5% increase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fiscal_policies_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget allocation */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget entry */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the budget allocation (e.g., Research, Operations, Maintenance) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount allocated for the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the allocation */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget allocation was made */,
  "allocation_status" TEXT /* Status of the allocation (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding (e.g., federal, state, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocations_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_outlays" (
  "outlay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget outlay */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget entry */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the budget outlay (e.g., Research, Operations, Maintenance) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount spent for the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the outlay */,
  "outlay_date" TEXT /* Date when the outlay was recorded */,
  "outlay_status" TEXT /* Status of the outlay (e.g., completed, in progress, pending) */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project or activity associated with the outlay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_outlays_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP contribution */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget entry */,
  "contribution_amount" REAL /* Amount of contribution to the GDP */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the contribution to GDP was recorded */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "contribution_status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., confirmed, estimated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_contributions_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget variation */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the budget variation (e.g., Research, Operations, Maintenance) */,
  "variation_type" TEXT /* Type of variation (e.g., Increase, Decrease) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of variation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the variation */,
  "variation_date" TEXT /* Date when the variation was recorded */,
  "variation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the variation (e.g., new project, cost-cutting) */,
  "variation_status" TEXT /* Status of the variation (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_variations_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_variations_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, policymaker, administrator) */,
  "user_level" INTEGER /* User level or hierarchy (e.g., 1 for analyst, 2 for policymaker, 3 for administrator) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the user is associated with */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the budget data */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
